description: Resumable per-page content tracker for the ClearHire docs site. Baseline pages documenting every shipped feature are complete; long-tail deep-enrichment batches are listed below.

enrichmentBacklog.rationale: career-tools.md summarizes ~10 sub-tools; each (ATS checker depth, cover-letter generator, bio/elevator-pitch, LinkedIn optimizer, keyword optimizer, interview prep, salary insights, career paths) can become its own 1000+ word how-to page with examples + FAQ.
for-companies.md is a single overview; split into per-task guides (post a job, screen applicants, initiate verification, search talent, write employee reviews).
One programmatic page per resume template with screenshots, best-for guidance, and ATS notes.

workflow: Confirm the candidate pages map to real app features (no fabrication).
Write each page to the SEO floor; wire into sidebars.ts.
Update this tracker; ONE commit per batch.
resumeInstructions: Baseline is shipped. To deep-enrich, take the first 'pending' batch in enrichmentBacklog, write its pages to the SEO floor, add them to sidebars.ts, verify the build, mark the batch complete, and commit.
